title: workspace.v1
description: A workspace is a USER git repo (the agent's durable memory) — data, not platform code. vexa owns ONLY the init template (the repo layout, see README) + this BASE entity-frontmatter convention. Customers extend the frontmatter per entity type (P11: the entity schema is config, not platform). Not a wire payload.

EntityFrontmatter.description: The typed YAML frontmatter atop a markdown entity (kg/entities/<type>/<slug>.md). Extensible — customers add fields per entity type.

type.description: entity type, e.g. contact | company | meeting
